title: Warmly Charred Russian Fennel Skewers
description: Indulgent Russian dish featuring charred fennel bulb, perfect for a Mediterranean-inspired snack, this recipe combines the crunch of snappy fennel with the indulgence of a warmly charred treat.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
Cut the fennel bulbs into 1-inch wedges.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper.
Add the fennel wedges to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated fennel onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Grill the fennel skewers for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, until charred and tender.
Meanwhile, mix the sour cream and chopped fresh dill in a small bowl.
Serve the charred fennel skewers with a dollop of the sour cream mixture.
